compiled_state.title: outbound-bridge: ticket status transitions not synced to Jira -> closed tickets remain In Progress in Jira
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Local tickets 4fae-8178 (epic, DIG-1417) and 43f1-e23d (task, DIG-1470) are both closed locally but remain 'In Progress' in Jira. The Outbound Bridge is not syncing status transitions for these tickets. DIG-1547 was filed in Jira specifically to report that DIG-1470 is stale.

## Expected Behavior
When a local ticket is transitioned to closed, the Outbound Bridge should update the corresponding Jira issue status to Done/Closed.

## Actual Behavior
Jira issues remain In Progress indefinitely after local closure. This may be caused by:
1. The Outbound Bridge crashes (bugs eccb-3f26 and 277e-d926) preventing the sync run from completing
2. The bridge script only syncing CREATE events but not STATUS transition events
3. The bridge filtering out archived/closed tickets before checking for status updates

## Evidence
- DIG-1417 (Jira: In Progress) vs 4fae-8178 (local: closed)
- DIG-1470 (Jira: In Progress) vs 43f1-e23d (local: closed)
- DIG-1547 filed in Jira to report this exact problem

comments.body:
Relevant ticket details:

LOCAL TICKETS (both closed, archived):
- 4fae-8178 (epic/closed): 'Skill Entry-Point UX: Smart Routing and Friction Reduction'
  - Closed with comment: 'Epic complete: all 4 tasks closed, all reviews passed, completion-verifier PASS, 43/43 tests pass, branch pushed'
  - Parent: none (top-level epic)
- 43f1-e23d (task/closed): 'GREEN: Implement --min-children and --max-children flags in sprint-list-epics.sh'
  - Parent: 4fae-8178
  - Child task of the above epic

JIRA ISSUES (both stale — still In Progress):
- DIG-1417 (Epic/In Progress): 'Skill Entry-Point UX: Smart Routing and Friction Reduction' — should be Done
- DIG-1470 (Task/In Progress): 'GREEN: Implement --min-children and --max-children flags in sprint-list-epics.sh' — should be Done

RELATED JIRA BUGS (filed by human, no local counterpart):
- DIG-1547 (Bug/To Do): 'DIG-1470 is still shown as in progress in Jira' — user noticed the stale status
- DIG-1546 (Bug/To Do): 'Jira is not updated with in progress epics, stories, or tasks' — broader complaint about sync
comments.author: Test
